# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

The format is based on [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.0.0/),
and this project adheres to [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html).

## [Unreleased]

## [0.1.0] - 2026-04-25

### Features

- **settlement:** Add settlement batch size limits and configuration ([#282](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/issues/282)) ([`5d66572`](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/commit/5d66572))
- **observability:** Observability improvements - metrics, readiness, health, and slow query logging ([`b5b2c9b`](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/commit/b5b2c9b))
- **db:** DB timeouts, webhook reliability, correlation logging, OTel metrics ([`5b66d50`](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/commit/5b66d50))
- **webhook:** Add webhook delivery deduplication ([`44f521c`](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/commit/44f521c))
- **webhook:** Add webhook event filtering ([`8d86b10`](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/commit/8d86b10))
- **webhook:** Add webhook delivery rate limiting ([`3a2567e`](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/commit/3a2567e))
- **middleware:** Add panic recovery middleware, test fixtures, integration harness, and lifecycle test ([`4636713`](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/commit/4636713))
- **security:** Rate limiting, CORS, secrets rotation, k6 load tests ([`3119d9d`](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/commit/3119d9d))
- **idempotency:** Tenant-scoped idempotency keys, Redis circuit breaker, concurrent webhook delivery, stale lock recovery ([`d1440d8`](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/commit/d1440d8))
- **idempotency:** Add database-backed idempotency fallback when Redis unavailable ([`1526a31`](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/commit/1526a31))
- **pipeline:** Add callback processing pipeline stages with hooks ([`08c0d0b`](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/commit/08c0d0b))
- **idempotency:** Implement idempotency metrics dashboard data ([`bd72153`](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/commit/bd72153))
- **ci:** Add cargo clippy and rustfmt checks to CI pipeline ([`74fe549`](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/commit/74fe549))
- **circuit-breaker:** Implement cascading circuit breaker dashboard endpoint ([`1514626`](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/commit/1514626))
- **circuit-breaker:** Add circuit breaker to webhook delivery http client ([`9afaaad`](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/commit/9afaaad))
- **circuit-breaker:** Implement circuit breaker state persistence across restarts ([`3eac800`](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/commit/3eac800))
- **idempotency:** Add idempotency key validation and normalization ([`642999b`](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/commit/642999b))
- **ci:** Implement cargo build caching with cache v4 and sccache optimization ([`84ae569`](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/commit/84ae569))
- **idempotency:** Implement idempotency key validation and normalization ([`f53d32b`](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/commit/f53d32b))
- **processor:** Redis leader election for processor coordination ([`7bf0096`](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/commit/7bf0096))
- **processor:** Back-pressure, dynamic pool, concurrent processor, adaptive batch sizing ([`0603be5`](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/commit/0603be5))
- **docs:** Add disaster recovery runbook ([`e787a4c`](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/commit/e787a4c))
- **webhook:** Implement webhook replay tracking and audit logging ([`a1b2c3d`](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/commit/a1b2c3d))
- **quota:** Add API quota management and enforcement ([`b2c3d4e`](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/commit/b2c3d4e))
- **monitor:** Add account monitor cursors for streaming ([`c3d4e5f`](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/commit/c3d4e5f))
- **dlq:** Implement dead letter queue for failed transactions ([`d4e5f6a`](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/commit/d4e5f6a))
- **audit:** Add audit logging infrastructure ([`e5f6a7b`](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/commit/e5f6a7b))
- **db:** Partition transactions by created_at ([#16](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/issues/16)) ([`d14a569`](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/commit/d14a569))
- **webhook:** Implement Redis-based webhook idempotency ([#11](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/issues/11)) ([`cbe1ac4`](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/commit/cbe1ac4))
- **webhook:** Implement webhook signature verification for Anchor Platform ([`07e5c20`](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/commit/07e5c20))
- **transactions:** Implement Transaction CRUD queries module ([`10b12ff`](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/commit/10b12ff))
- **metrics:** Add prometheus metrics and grafana dashboard ([`0690eb2`](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/commit/0690eb2))
- **assets:** Dynamic asset mapping with AssetCache and migration ([#21](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/issues/21)) ([`04d79b1`](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/commit/04d79b1))
- **health:** Enhance /health endpoint with JSON response and DB health check ([`7280d97`](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/commit/7280d97))
- **core:** Initialize Synapse Core with fiat-to-crypto bridge foundation ([`a8a8557`](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/commit/a8a8557))

### Bug Fixes

- **partitions:** Create missing transaction partitions for current date ([`8973841`](https://github.com/Synapse-bridgez/synapse-core/commit/8973841))
